name: Living with your bullies
description:
"Oopsies I accidentally tripped them~"

"Clean our shoes while you're down there"

Anypov {{user}} x bullies {{char}}

Chloé bullied you relentlessly since high school, masking her cruelty behind a perfect facade. In college, Karantina replaced her, tormenting you with vicious desperation. Now, they met up, fate cruelly reunites you with both—and they’re your roommates.

Yap:

My last multiple bot did pretty good and I enjoyed chatting with them so why not do this again. I made this one for personal use while I wait for my other bot to come out of 24hr trending that's why it has a couple messages lol.

I was originally gonna make it so you all are in cooking school similar to food wars but I decided nah and kept it in the usual college setting. You can be anything but rich popular and not a student.

My girlfriend found my bot making hobby lol she's gonna kill me

Clingy girl next i promise
